meetings.title: Q1 Product Planning Meeting
meetings.transcript: Sarah: Good morning everyone. We need to discuss the Q1 roadmap. First, let's talk about the new payment system. John: We've analyzed the requirements. We need to migrate from Stripe to a custom payment gateway.. This will take approximately 4 weeks. We'll need to refactor the billing module, update the API endpoints, and implement new security measures. The technical debt here is significant - our current system uses outdated authentication tokens. Mike: I agree. We should also consider implementing Redis caching for transaction records. This could improve performance by 40%. Lisa: On the frontend, we'll need to update the checkout flow and add real-time payment status tracking. This might take 2 weeks. Sarah: Great. What about the timeline? John: Overall, we're looking at 6 weeks if we do it sequentially. But if Mike and I work in parallel on the backend optimization, we could compress it to 5 weeks. Sarah: OK, and budget considerations? John: We need about $5000 for infrastructure upgrades and testing tools. Also, we should schedule a security audit before going live. This is critical for PCI compliance. Sarah: Noted. What are the risks? Mike: The main risk is data migration. We need a robust rollback strategy. Lisa: We should also do A/B testing on the new checkout UI before full rollout. Sarah: Agreed. Let's document all this and get buy-in from the stakeholders. John: We'll prepare a technical specification document by Friday. Mike: I'll create the database migration scripts by Wednesday. Lisa: I'll have wireframes ready by Thursday. Sarah: Perfect. Next meeting in 2 weeks to review progress and create a github issue on the project board for each of these action items. Also, we should set up automation for our GitHub workflow - assign issues to team members based on their expertise, and create pull requests from our test branch to main branch for each feature. John: That's a good point. Let me summarize the GitHub work items: We need to create pull request 'Implement custom payment gateway migration' from test to main for code review - Mike should review this. We also need to create pull request 'Add Redis caching for transaction optimization' from test to main - John should review. Additionally, create pull request 'Update checkout flow with real-time payment status' from test to main - Lisa should review that one. For assignments: Issue #1 'Refactor billing module API endpoints' goes to Mike, Issue #2 'Implement Redis caching layer' goes to John, Issue #3 'Update checkout flow UI' goes to Lisa, Issue #4 'Conduct security audit for PCI compliance' goes to John, and Issue #5 'Create database migration and rollback scripts' goes to Mike. Sarah: Oh, before we close, please send an email to santhsim regarding his internship for 6 months. We need to get that finalized. Also, don't forget to schedule our formal 'Payment Gateway Sync' meeting for next Tuesday at 10:00 AM. And a reminder, next Friday is 'Company Wellness Day', so put that on the calendar as an all-day holiday. One last thing, can someone add a Trello card to 'Update the onboarding documentation for new hires' under our HR list? And also make another Trello card for 'Renew domain names' with the note that the domains expire next month. Thanks everyone!
